testcase.classname: In order to remember the things i want to do, as a ToDo MVC user, I want to manage my ToDo List
testcase.name: MVC User Create Task in ToDo
testcase.system-out: When User add task to ToDo list as Validate.................................passed Then User Verify task is added under ToDo List as Validate..................passed And User Verify task is displayed in Active Tab as Validate.................passed And User Verify ToDo Count..................................................passed

testcase.classname: In order to remember the things i want to do, as a ToDo MVC user, I want to manage my ToDo List
testcase.name: MVC User Create Task in ToDo 2
testcase.system-out: When User add task to ToDo list as Compile..................................passed Then User Verify task is added under ToDo List as Compile...................passed And User Verify task is displayed in Active Tab as Compile..................passed And User Verify ToDo Count..................................................passed
